name: TradeAlpha Workflow Schedule
description: User-controllable weekly publishing cadence for the unified TradeAlpha Workflow. Edit weekly_schedule to control how many articles, news and forecasts publish each day of the week. The orchestrator runs once per day and skips slots that have already been delivered.

notes.article: Long-form research/educational article (editorial, like Investing.com analysis pieces). Mapped to brain content-type 'editorial'.
notes.news: News-driven market analysis with concrete numbers (volatility regime, breadth shifts, sector rotation). Mapped to brain content-type 'continuous-intelligence'.
notes.forecast: Daily/weekly price + macro outlook with conviction read. Mapped to brain content-type 'market-outlook'.
notes.how_to_edit: Change any value in weekly_schedule to set the daily quota per type. Keys 0-6 are Sunday..Saturday. Set 0 to disable a type that day. The orchestrator respects per-day quotas, dedupes against published-history files, and only publishes new content.
